accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text; the description of conditions and requirements is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; BLM and Forest Service are correctly identified as the conveying agencies.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: conveying federal lands to Utah for three state parks.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Bill does not amend existing statutory law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Covers key conditions: easements, specific water rights for Fremont Indian, cost responsibility for other parks.

effective_dates.why: Does not mention the 180-day deadlines, but omitting figures is acceptable for a high-level summary.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all three conveyances and their essential conditions including reversionary interest.

concise.why: Appropriately concise while hitting all key provisions.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies BLM, Forest Service, and all three state parks.

correct_figures.why: No specific figures stated in the summary.
